A note before you enter

TAWQ is a technology-led master brand built to operate complex systems where precision matters.

It expresses itself in two ways. Entertainment turns engineering into spectacle, atmosphere, and the silence that follows a stadium going dark. Technologies & Solutions turns the same engineering into the infrastructure that keeps governments, giga-projects, and critical operations running.

Same discipline. Different rooms.

01 The Atmosphere

TAWQ
Entertainment

Drones, dynamic lighting, LED, interactive environments, and water-based spectacle. Composed into single moments that audiences carry home.

Water-Based Spectacle

Designed to be felt, not just seen.

Water-Based Spectacle

The least imitable axis.

Flyboards, fountains, choreographed marine craft, large-scale water installations. The discipline closest to TAWQ's heritage and the hardest for any competitor to replicate at scale.

Board Sports

Movement, lifted into the sky.

Board Sports & Action

Kitesurf, wakeboard, hydrofoil.

The action layer of TAWQ's water world. Where individual riders meet engineered conditions and a coastline becomes a stage for performance.

Marine Craft

The coastline becomes a stage.

Marine Craft

Boats, yachts, jet craft.

Curated marine performance for destination openings, brand activations, and signature programming. The fleet behind the spectacle.

Sky Choreography

The sky becomes a stage.

Sky Choreography

Drones, fireworks, light in the air.

One thousand drones. Twelve minutes. One silence. The kind of sky-scale moment a country watches together and remembers for years.

Movement & Energy

Movement. Energy. Experience.

Movement & Energy

Wakeboards, paddle, kinetic craft.

Active water experiences from individual adventure to group programming. The participatory layer between spectacle and sport.

The technology is invisible. The feeling is the product.

TAWQ Entertainment · Brand Principle
TAWQ One Architecture
02 The Infrastructure

TAWQ
Technologies & Solutions

Aerial and drone-enabled systems, digital platforms, and integrated technology operations. Built for governments, giga-projects, and critical environments.

Aerial Operations

Technology built for precision and control.

Aerial Operations

Drone fleet and pilot capability.

In-house drone operations across multiple sectors. Surveying, mapping, asset digitization, monitoring, and integrated aerial workflows for ministries and enterprise clients.

GACA-Compliant Multi-Sector 24/7 Ops
System Integration

Designed to operate. Built to perform.

System Integration

Networks that think together.

Integrated technology systems where drones, sensors, digital platforms, and command-and-control work as one continuous operation. Built to scale across multiple sites and sectors.

Cloud-Native Real-Time
Precision Agriculture

Designed for complex environments.

Precision Agriculture

Crops, irrigation, livestock at scale.

Drone-enabled agricultural operations across Saudi Green Initiative programs and commercial farming. Crop health monitoring, precision spraying, irrigation analysis.

SGI-Aligned Multi-Sensor
Infrastructure Inspection

Operations without interruption.

Infrastructure Inspection

Critical assets, monitored.

Pipelines, towers, plants, solar fields, and substations. Aerial inspection programs with thermal, RGB, and ultrasonic capabilities; predictive maintenance and condition reporting.

Thermal · RGB · UT
Digital Platforms

The software underneath the systems.

Digital Platforms

The interfaces and software stack.

Custom digital platforms for government and enterprise operations. Data visualization, cognitive analytics, command-and-control surfaces, and integration with existing systems.

API-First Secure-by-Design
Live Operations

The Architecture

Atmosphere and Infrastructure,
under one operator.

What makes TAWQ structurally rare is not either business unit in isolation. It is that the discipline that operates a critical pipeline is the same discipline that engineers a thousand-drone sky. The two units share a brand role, a values system, and an operational backbone. They differ in audience, surface, and aesthetic. Read together, they are the most defensible position in the Saudi technology-meets-experience market.
